title: Front suspension architecture — PRIMARY_SOURCE_REQUIRED

locked_configuration.summary: 2019 Ford F-450 Chassis Cab Regular Cab 4x2 DRW 145.3 WB / 60 CA

reason: Exact-vehicle research sprint found no VERIFIED_EVIDENCE for F-450 4x2 front suspension architecture. BBAS and service-manual candidates are NOT_ACQUIRED. Uploaded suspension geometry research file review was NOT_EXECUTED. Architectural decision would be premature and risk 4x4 / wrong-WB contamination.
decision: No Beam/Monobeam vs Twin-I-Beam architecture decision.
All current front-suspension technical assertions remain CANDIDATE_ASSERTION or RESEARCH_REQUIRED.
Retract any claim that the F-450 Suspension Geometry Research upload was authoritatively reviewed.
Acquire and hash CAND-FORD-BBAS-2019 and/or CAND-FORD-SM-2019 bound to VEH-000001/CFG-000001 before any architecture resolution.
Do not import 4x4 driven-beam or 169.3 in WB geometry into this silo.
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 unchanged.
